results.validation_notes: Previous classification as Microservices/Event-Driven is incorrect. Deep context shows only 2 services (frontend+backend), not microservices. No Kafka/RabbitMQ configuration visible in Dockerfiles. The system IS fundamentally a Multi-Agent architecture - autonomous AI agents with defined roles (Agent Builder, workflow blocks) that coordinate via blocks to solve complex tasks. Service-Based applies as secondary style for the frontend/backend deployment separation.
